basic_01_inventory_cash.reason: Dr Inventory $100 / Cr Cash $100 — correct accounts and amounts; 'Inventory' = 'Inventories' minor naming variant

basic_02_inventory_on_account.reason: Dr Inventory $300 / Cr Accounts Payable $300 — correct; 'Accounts Payable' = 'Trade payables' naming variant

basic_03_issue_stock_with_apic.reason: Dr Cash $180 / Cr Common Stock $100 / Cr Additional Paid-In Capital $80 — correct accounts and amounts; 'Common Stock' = 'Share capital—Common', 'Additional Paid-In Capital' = 'APIC'

basic_04_sell_inventory.reason: Dr Cash $500 / Dr Cost of Goods Sold $300 / Cr Sales Revenue $500 / Cr Inventory $300 — correct; 'Sales Revenue' = 'Revenue', 'COGS' naming variant

basic_05_pay_accounts_payable.reason: Dr Accounts Payable $50 / Cr Cash $50 — correct; 'Accounts Payable' = 'Trade payables' naming variant

basic_06_refinance_loan.reason: Dr Notes Payable — Old Loan $100 / Cr Notes Payable — New Loan $100 — correct; both are Notes payable sub-accounts, amounts match

basic_07_loan_to_equity.reason: Dr Bank Loan Payable $200 / Cr Common Shares $200 — correct; 'Bank Loan Payable' = 'Notes payable' (loan liability), 'Common Shares' = 'Share capital—Common'

basic_08_deliver_service_against_deposit.reason: Dr Deferred Revenue $100 / Cr Service Revenue $100 — correct; 'Deferred Revenue' = 'Contract liabilities', 'Service Revenue' = 'Revenue'

basic_09_repurchase_stock.reason: Dr Treasury Shares $200 / Cr Cash $200 — exact match on accounts and amounts

basic_10_declare_dividend.reason: Dr Retained Earnings $500,000 / Cr Dividends Payable $500,000 — exact match on accounts and amounts

basic_11_convert_preferred_to_common.reason: Dr Preferred Shares $100 / Cr Common Shares $100 — correct; 'Preferred Shares' = 'Share capital—Preferred', 'Common Shares' = 'Share capital—Common'

basic_12_pay_salaries.reason: Dr Salaries Expense $100 / Cr Cash $100 — exact match on accounts and amounts

basic_13_accrue_utility.reason: Dr Utilities Expense $50 / Cr Accrued Liabilities $50 — exact match on accounts and amounts

basic_14_casualty_loss.reason: Dr Casualty Loss $2,000 / Cr Inventory $2,000 — correct; 'Inventory' = 'Inventories' minor naming variant

basic_15_no_entry.reason: Empty lines [] — correctly produced no journal entry for non-financial event
